feature: Run and verify claude adapter e2e test
workflow_rationale: This is a straightforward test execution task with minimal complexity - run a test, fix if needed, verify with make check, and document the result. No multi-service coordination or complex dependencies.

phases.name: Test Execution and Verification
phases.description: Execute the claude adapter end-to-end test, fix any issues, and verify the build

subtasks.description: Verify test script prompt template is explicit about Write tool usage
subtasks.notes: Verified: lines 308-311 contain 'Use the Write tool to create files. Create the output/ directory first if needed.' - prompt is explicit about Write tool usage

verification.expected: All tests pass, clippy succeeds, formatting is correct
